title: Software Testing Analyst
description:
Job Summary
This role supports core banking projects through UAT preparation, and defect management; It requires strong analytical skills, effective stakeholder collaboration, troubleshooting ability.

Mandatory Skill-set

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field;
  • Minimum 4–5 years of experience in consumer banking–related projects.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills;
  • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision and multitask effectively;
  • Hands-on experience conducting UAT and manual testing in a regulated banking environment.
  • Strong understanding of banking processes, controls, and compliance requirements.
  • Familiarity with defect management tools such as JIRA.

Responsibilities

  • Analyse user requirements and enhancement requests.
  • Plan, design, and execute UAT and manual test cases for banking web applications.
  • Design comprehensive test scenarios based on business and functional requirements.
  • Log, track, manage, and close system defects using JIRA, with clear reproduction steps.
  • Perform regression testing to validate fixes and ensure overall release stability.
  • Document test results and provide regular updates on testing progress and timelines.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, business analysts, and stakeholders throughout the testing lifecycle.
  • Act as a liaison to resolve outstanding issues prior to reaching the UAT sign-off stage.

Should you be interested in this career opportunity, please send in your updated resume to apply@sciente.com at the earliest.
When you apply, you voluntarily consent to the disclosure, collection and use of your personal data for employment/recruitment and related purposes in accordance with the SCIENTE Group Privacy Policy, a copy of which is published at SCIENTE’s website (https://www.sciente.com/privacy-policy).

Confidentiality is assured, and only shortlisted candidates will be notified for interviews.

postedCompany.description:
SCIENTE CONSULTING PTE. LTD.


Our vision is to build a global organization with a difference - which we shall achieve through our mission of "delighted Clients & Community".

Sciente Consulting is a specialist business technology consulting services firm focused in large global multinational corporations within insurance and financial services industries  in Singapore (HQ), Malaysia, India and USA. 

Amalgamation of business & technology competencies, agile business model and our methodology of client alignment derives a unique Value Innovation which has been an integral part of the strategy to delight its Clients with value proposition and a clear differentiation. 

Philanthropy through social innovations, is very much part of Sciente culture to build the corporation with a difference and to delight the community. MyTechLogy.com is one of the social innovations projects by Sciente.

Please visit https://www.scienteconsulting.com to know more about us and to view more career opportunities.
